src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: [G12] The File part binds via @RequestPart MultipartFile; query-source scalar inputs bind via typed @RequestParam (optional altText/position boxed so absent → null; required enum). The dispatch references the declared @RequestParam locals, not undeclared variables. Enum type is imported.
contains: new AddProductImageCommand(productId, file, altText, position, imageType)

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: Query-source scalar inputs carry their real Java types in the command record (String/Integer/enum), not MultipartFile.
